---
title: "CC Spatial Master follow along"
author: "Edwin Yánez"
date: "2025-03-03"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(sp)
#library(rgdal)   # Phased out in 2023
library(terra)   # Succesor of rgdal
library(raster)
library(ggplot2)
library(viridis)
library(rasterVis)
```

## Purpose
This is a follow-along document reporting my engagement with Coding Club's [Intro to spatial analysis in R](https://ourcodingclub.github.io/tutorials/spatial/index.html) tutorial. Most of the content is lifted directly from there with minor modifications and updates from my part. Not everything in the tutorial should be expected to be replicated here.

## Explore raster data
